build: Session-2 follow-up: light up the bridge
problem: The entity<->graph bridge seeded a person/company node (proven live: Terras = node 199), but the node was ISOLATED — no edges — so graphRelationsForEntity returned nothing and the ENTITY <-> GRAPH LINKS block never appeared in chat. The bridge was wired but invisible.
fix: Give a bridged node EDGES: anchor it (related_to) to the research nodes it is semantically closest to, so the links become real and visible. Track-B-oriented: links people/companies INTO the research graph (e.g. Terras -> related_to -> Collatz nodes).

changes.lib/memory-graph.js: Added ensureEntityGraphNode(name,type,summary) (find-or-seed) and anchorEntityNode(node,queryText). anchorEntityNode: gated on M8_ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_WRITE=1; SKIPS the embedding/match entirely once the node already has >= M8_ANCHOR_SKIP_EDGES (default 2) edges; else graphMatch(queryText, k6, minSim M8_ANCHOR_MIN_SIM default 0.45) -> addEdge related_to to the top <= M8_ANCHOR_MAX_EDGES (default 2) substantive matches (excludes self + research_thread), tagged metadata.bridged_anchor. Exported both.
changes.lib/entity-graph.js: bridgeEntitiesToGraph reworked to a clean 3-step loop per bridgeable entity: (1) ensureEntityGraphNode -> (2) anchorEntityNode(name+summary) -> (3) graphRelationsForEntity for the link line. No longer calls bridgeEntityNode directly (now via ensureEntityGraphNode).
changes.tests/brain-surface-verify.ps1: Updated 1 stale assertion (write-back now reached via ensureEntityGraphNode). Still 48/48.
changes.tests/bridge-edges-verify.ps1: New 25/25 PS mirror for the anchoring.

honesty_safety: Edges are `related_to` ONLY — a NON-evidence, non-proof relation. The Build-41 schema edge-ban restricts supports/formalizes; related_to is explicitly allowed. So anchoring can NEVER fabricate evidence/proof structure (test asserts no rel:'supports').
OPT-IN: anchoring (like seeding) is a no-op unless M8_ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_WRITE=1. Default deploy = read-only, zero new edges.

Bounded/cheap: skips the embedding call once a node has >= 2 edges, so the graphMatch cost is paid at most the first turn or two per entity; <= 2 new edges per call; min-similarity gated; addEdge dedups (src,dst,rel).
Fail-safe: every helper try/catches to 0/null; a graphMatch/embedding failure just skips (retries next turn). renderGraphPacket / the graph hard-route untouched.
tests: tests/bridge-edges-verify.ps1 25/25 + tests/brain-surface-verify.ps1 48/48 regression (PS static mirror; host has no Node). Live: tests/BRIDGE-EDGES_LIVE_TEST.md.
live_verify_plan: After deploy, with the flag already ON: ask 'what did Terras prove?' -> Terras node 199 gets related_to edges to Collatz nodes (verify in m8_graph_edges, metadata bridged_anchor) -> a later Terras turn shows the ENTITY <-> GRAPH LINKS block. Claude can run the verification SQL on request.
track_b_note: Per Muhammad 2026-06-22: M8 focus shifts to Track B (the unsolved-problem engine); Bolt / Track-A parked for now. This build is the bridge piece that makes the research brain's people<->problems relationships visible.
